channel.title: Posts on 20's 블로그
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 20's 블로그

item.title: Mac OS에 스파크3 설치 및 pyspark 시작
item.description:
맥북 Mac OS에 Spark를 설치해보고 주피터 노트북에서 pyspark를 실행해보자!
NT. Java 와 Python은 설치 돼 있다는 가정으로 진행한다.

# Reason why we have the getOrCreate code # http://stackoverflow.com/questions/28999332/how-to-access-sparkcontext-in-pyspark-script sc = SparkContext.getOrCreate() sc <p><a href="http://172.30.1.9:4041">Spark UI</a></p> <dl> <dt>Version</dt> <dd><code>v3.0.1</code></dd> <dt>Master</dt> <dd><code>local[2]</code></dd> <dt>AppName</dt> <dd><code>PySparkShell</code></dd> </dl> import numpy as np TOTAL = 1000000 dots = sc.parallelize([2.0 * np.random.random(2) - 1.0 for i in range(TOTAL)]).cache() print("Number of random points:", dots.count()) stats = dots.stats() print('Mean:', stats.mean()) print('stdev:', stats.stdev()) Number of random points: 1000000 Mean: [-0.00076914 0.00090079] stdev: [0.57721218 0.57750566] dots.collect()[:5] ## 형식 구경하기 [array([0.
